user.title: IPP printer
user.description: Connect to a network printer via IPP. For HTTPS printers with self-signed certs, leave verify off. If you see SSL handshake failures, enable relaxed ciphers (needed for some HP LaserJet models that only offer non-PFS ciphers).

data.port: Port (443 for IPPS, 631 for IPP, 80 for HTTP)
data.password: Password (only if printer requires basic auth)

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the printer. Check host/port/TLS settings. Detail: {error_detail}
